title: Rating
description: Star rating control. Supports half steps, read-only mode and all color and size variants.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Five stars, warning color by default. Clicking the active value resets it.

half.title: Half stars
half.desc: Enable allow-half for ratings in 0.5 steps and show the numeric value.

readonlyDisabled.title: Read-only and disabled
readonlyDisabled.desc: readonly preserves active styles; disabled adds opacity.

props.clearable: Re-clicking the active value resets it to 0.
props.color: Semantic color of the filled stars.
props.showValue: Displays the numeric value next to the rating.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the value changes (syncs v-model).

types.title: Rating
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Rating component props. Supports half-steps, clearable stars, and numeric value display.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbArrow: Change the rating value by one step
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the rating group
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.focusNative: Each star is a focusable button — arrow keys navigate and change the value
a11y.focusReadonly: Read-only mode preserves visual state and announces the current value without allowing edits
